title: alisma taeniifolium
intro: Alisma taeniifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the water plantain family. This plant has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Alisma taeniifolium include its ability to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and edema, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Alisma taeniifolium is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to treat various health conditions.
